# Hivecom

> Hivecom is a worldwide community of friends hosting game servers, building projects, and running communication platforms. Founded in 2013, it has grown from three friends on a Raspberry Pi to a self-managed, independently hosted community platform with its own infrastructure, website, forums, events system, and more.

Hivecom was created by **zealsprince** (formerly known as Catlinman), **Jokler**, and **Trif**. What started as a small home-hosted TeamSpeak server has evolved into a full community platform serving members from all around the world.

The community motto: *"A community of friends from all around the world."*

## What is Hivecom?

Hivecom is a long-running, independently operated online community. It is not a company or a commercial service. It is a group of people who enjoy gaming, building things together, and staying connected across time zones and generations.

Key characteristics:
- Founded in 2013, making it over a decade old as of 2025
- Entirely self-hosted and community-funded infrastructure
- Bridges multiple communication platforms (IRC, TeamSpeak, Discord) so members on any platform can talk to each other
- Hosts game servers for the community to play on together
- Runs community events, movie nights, game sessions, and more
- Open source website: the full source code is publicly available on GitHub
- Has a forum for ongoing community discussions
- Has a voting/referendum system for community decisions
- Has a community badge system to reward long-term members and participation
- Accepts community funding via Patreon with transparent expense tracking

## Communication Platforms

Hivecom bridges the following platforms so members are never siloed:

- **IRC** – Primary chat platform. Connect via the web client at https://irc.hivecom.net or directly via SSL at `irc.hivecom.net:6697`. Main support channel: `#staff`.
- **TeamSpeak** – Voice chat server. European node at `eu.ts.hivecom.net` (port 9987). Also accessible at `ts.hivecom.net`.
- **Discord** – Invite link: https://discord.gg/2xsJcSuUhW. Bridged to IRC and TeamSpeak via bots.
- **Syncplay** – Synchronized media watching server at `syncplay.hivecom.net:8999` for community movie nights and watch parties.

## Social & External Links

- Discord: https://discord.gg/2xsJcSuUhW
- Steam Group: https://www.steamcommunity.com/groups/hivecomnetwork
- Twitch: https://www.twitch.tv/hivecom
- GitHub Organization: https://github.com/hivecom
- Patreon: https://www.patreon.com/hivecom

## Key Pages

- [Home](https://hivecom.net/): Overview, community stats, upcoming events, and platform connection links
- [Events](https://hivecom.net/events): Community events listing and calendar — includes ongoing, upcoming, and past events
- [Game Servers](https://hivecom.net/servers/gameservers): Live game server listings and status
- [Voice Servers](https://hivecom.net/servers/voiceservers): Live TeamSpeak channel viewer and connection info
- [Forum](https://hivecom.net/forum): Community discussion board with topics and threaded discussions
- [Community](https://hivecom.net/community): About the community, member directory, active projects, and funding overview
- [Votes](https://hivecom.net/votes): Community referendum and voting system for decisions and event planning

## Community Sub-pages

- [Community Projects](https://hivecom.net/community/projects): Public projects and initiatives hosted by or for the Hivecom community
- [Community Badges](https://hivecom.net/community/badges): Overview of earnable badges — awarded for milestones like years of membership, event hosting, forum activity, and financial support
- [Funding](https://hivecom.net/community/funding): Transparent breakdown of community funding and server expenses

## Events & Calendar

Hivecom runs regular community events including game sessions, movie/watch nights (via Syncplay), and other gatherings. Events are tracked on the site and also available as calendar subscriptions:

- Google Calendar: https://calendar.google.com/calendar?cid=Y181Zjk0NjNjNTQzMTBhNWNiNzYxNjhkM2QxZTU1ZjQzMzI0MjliZDZmNjk0NTRlOTM1MDUwZDY5YTRjZThkZGJiQGdyb3VwLmNhbGVuZGFyLmdvb2dsZS5jb20
- iCal feed: https://calendar.google.com/calendar/ical/c_5f9463c54310a5cb76168d3d1e55f4332429bd6f69454e935050d69a4ce8ddbb%40group.calendar.google.com/public/basic.ics

## Projects

- [Community Projects](https://hivecom.net/community/projects): Public projects and initiatives
- [Hivecom on GitHub](https://github.com/hivecom): Open source repositories and tooling
- [hivecom.net source code](https://github.com/hivecom/hivecom.net): Full source for this website (Nuxt 4 + Supabase)

## Legal

- [Privacy Policy](https://hivecom.net/legal/privacy): How member data is handled
- [Terms of Service](https://hivecom.net/legal/terms): Rules and terms for using the platform

## Contact & Support

- Email: contact@hivecom.net
- IRC: `#staff` on `irc.hivecom.net:6697`

## Technical Notes (for AI/LLM context)

- The website is built with **Nuxt 4** (Vue 3, TypeScript) and uses **Supabase** as its backend (database, auth, edge functions).
- The site is statically generated and deployed via GitHub Actions.
- Hivecom has been continuously operating since **2013** — it is one of the longer-running independent gaming communities on the internet.
- Membership is free. Optional financial support is available via Patreon.
- The community is **not affiliated with any game studio, publisher, or commercial entity**.
- IRC remains a first-class platform — Hivecom runs its own IRC server, and Discord is bridged to it rather than replacing it.
